Tip of the day
Quality outcome will help raise the chances for better quality items seen at the bottom of recipes in the crafting interface.

Oak skis

From Walkscape Walkthrough

Other languages:

Oak skis
Rarity:
Type: Loot
Slot: Feet
Value: 21
Keywords: Regional
Skis
Search
Keywords: 		Agility
Jarvonia
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

Heavy skis, which makes them speedy but difficult to steer. At least their strength won't let them break easily if you crash!

The Oak skis item is a loot item.

Requirements

  • At least Agility lvl. 25.
  • Complete the Skate skiing activity [50] times.

Attribute

+24% Work efficiency While doing Agility.
While in the Jarvonia area.

Uses

This item may be equipped to your character.

Sources

Shop Purchases

Shop Name Location Region Item Type Stock Price
JarvoJoy Frusenholm Jarvonia 3 89

Guides

No guides exists yet. You can help make one.

Gear Sets

No gear sets exist yet. You can help make one.
